title: Were-House!
description: The most terrifying thing anyone could witness. This is Were-House!
quote: I see the mailbox, but where‘s the house?
altHero: a spooky old house with broken panels that look like teeth
alt1: four teens walking through the woods
alt2: three teens stop to talk while one checks their phone
alt4: a large house with sharp teeth casts a shadow on the teens
